## What & why

Briefly: what does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Verified in the real app (`bun run tauri dev`), not just in theory
- [ ] Looks right in all three themes (Paper / Sepia / Midnight)
- [ ] Quality gates pass: `bun run typecheck` · `bunx biome check src` · `bun run test` · `cargo check --workspace --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] No GPL added to the bundled dependency tree
- [ ] Nothing leaves the device without explicit user action

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (screenshots welcome).
